pi_items.source: script analysis of setup_task.sh and verification logic
script analysis of setup_task.sh and verification logic

privileged_info_summary: The task utilizes case BraTS2021_00000 from the BraTS 2021 dataset. In 3D Slicer's RAS coordinate system, the standard slice orientations are Axial [0, 0, 1], Sagittal [1, 0, 0], and Coronal [0, 1, 0]. Verification requires the user to generate an oblique slice that deviates from these standard orientations by at least 15 degrees and intersects a minimum of 100 tumor voxels. The tumor voxel count is dynamic and specific to the individual patient case.
